name: Falsifier Adversarial Review Evaluation
description: Golden trajectories for the Falsifier adversarial-review specialist (v4 sub-move A4). Verifies (1) orchestrator delegates to falsifier BEFORE calling any notify_* peer tool when a specialist returns requires_escalation, (2) falsifier invokes review_dispatch with the proposed dispatch params, and (3) the verdict (concur | dissent | abstain) ships in the Court-Evidence bundle and downstream A2A peer calls.

parts.text: Audio Agent flagged a gunshot at Tag-22 corridor, Serengeti, 23:47 UTC, confidence 0.92. Severity: critical. Threat signals: gunshot, vehicle_engine. Material species: African elephant (Vulnerable). Escalate.

Falsifier verdict: concur (4/4 gates passed). Ranger dispatch acknowledged by Park Service. TNFD entry filed by Sponsor Sustainability. Funder receipt issued. Neighbor park notified. Verdict appears in court-evidence chain of custody.
Audio Agent flagged a possible gunshot at Etosha F-14 fenceline. Confidence: 0.41. Severity proposed: high. No corroborating threat signals. Escalate?

Falsifier verdict: dissent (audio_confidence × severity gate failed at 0.41 < 0.55 floor for high). Dispatch proceeds — Falsifier is audit, not block — but the dissent record ships in the chain of custody and the TNFD filing so the auditor sees both sides.
Camera trap event from 3 hours ago — vehicle in restricted zone, Maasai Mara. Severity: medium. Threat signal: vehicle_intrusion. Observation timestamp 2026-05-17T20:14Z. Now: 2026-05-17T23:30Z.
Falsifier verdict: abstain (observation freshness gate: 3h > 1h ceiling). Stale events route to backfill queue, not live dispatch. No Park Service paging.
